mode.description: direct = run sequence; done = goal satisfied after COMPLETED has entries

sequence.description: Runnable Python steps: file modifications, git operations, bus messages, audits.

code.description: Python 3 script. ASCII only. Pre-imported: Path, subprocess, bus_post, bus_id, bus_request, os, sys, json, time. Use print() for evidence.

done_when.description: Measurable outcome: file modified and compiled, git commit pushed, bus message sent, audit written
